enabled.description: Desired VPC Service Controls state service producer VPC network, as described at the top of this page.

network.description: The network that the consumer is using to connect with services.

service.description: The service that is managing peering connectivity for a service producer's organization. For Google services that support this functionality, this value is `servicenetworking.googleapis.com`.

project.description: The id of the Google Cloud project containing the consumer network.
